title: Age Group Classification
scenario: Ask the model to classify a person's age group (0-12, 13-24, 25-64, 65+) based on a given sentence. The sentence should be under 50 words. The model output should be one of the four age groups.
constraints: Include a specific age-related sentence (e.g. 'The person just celebrated their 18th birthday')

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the model output correctly classify the person's age group?
Does the response include a specific age-related sentence?
